overall.description: A cinematic gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a futuristic sports car driving through Night City at dusk. The vehicle travels from an enclosed tunnel across a suspension bridge and through various urban environments including neon-lit commercial districts and industrial highway underpasses.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed urban tunnel with vertical neon lighting

events.description: approaching tunnel exit with bright daylight visible ahead

agents.ego_description: driving through enclosed tunnel following a leading vehicle

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: concrete tunnel ceiling with structural beams
dark concrete walls with vertical light fixtures
cool white vertical strip lights mounted on tunnel walls
bright yellow double lines dividing the road lanes

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a dark enclosed tunnel with concrete walls and ceiling. Vertical neon strip lights illuminate the path as the vehicle follows a silver sedan. The camera approaches the tunnel exit where bright daylight becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: suspension bridge with city skyline backdrop

events.description: exiting tunnel onto open suspension bridge with city view
transitioning from artificial tunnel lighting to natural dusk lighting

agents.ego_description: driving across the suspension bridge toward the city skyline

notable_agents.action: leading vehicle maintaining steady speed ahead

entered.detail: thick steel suspension cables of the bridge structure
asphalt road surface with yellow lane markings
futuristic glass and steel skyscrapers with illuminated windows
calm water visible below the bridge deck
orange and pink sunset sky with scattered clouds
bright orange safety railings along bridge sides

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the tunnel onto a wide suspension bridge. The scene opens to a stunning dusk sky with orange hues, revealing a futuristic city skyline of glass skyscrapers ahead. Steel suspension cables frame the view as the car drives across the bridge deck above calm waters.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon with green noise barriers

events.description: entering urban canyon with high walls and green noise barriers
passing under overhead pedestrian walkway structure

agents.ego_description: navigating through the enclosed urban canyon following traffic

notable_agents.action: yellow truck driving ahead in the distance

entered.detail: tall green translucent noise dampening walls along the road
tall concrete and glass building facades lining the road
elevated pedestrian bridge crossing above the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters an urban canyon flanked by green noise barriers and tall building walls. The sky becomes partially visible overhead as the car passes under an elevated pedestrian walkway. The lighting shifts to a mix of natural dusk and artificial street lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial district with digital billboards

events.description: entering commercial district with large digital billboards and neon signage
navigating through intersection with cross traffic and traffic signals

agents.ego_description: cruising through the neon commercial district with moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving parallel in the adjacent lane

entered.detail: multi-story buildings with illuminated storefronts and signage
massive glowing advertisement screens on building facades
bright pink and blue neon signs for various businesses
ground floor retail spaces with glowing windows

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a vibrant commercial district filled with large digital billboards and colorful neon signage. The vehicle drives past street-level shops and illuminated building facades while navigating moderate traffic including a white sedan in the adjacent lane.

events.description: entering highway underpass with red ambient lighting and concrete pillars
exiting underpass into brighter commercial area with neon storefronts

agents.ego_description: driving under elevated highway structures with moderate traffic density

notable_agents.action: black car overtaking on the left side

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel elevated highway overhead
thick cylindrical pillars supporting the overhead highway
ambient red lighting illuminating the underpass area
large metal pipes and conduits running along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dark highway underpass characterized by massive concrete support pillars and red ambient lighting. Exposed industrial pipes run overhead beneath the elevated highway. The car briefly exits into a brighter commercial area before continuing under the infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep industrial corridor with exposed pipe infrastructure

events.description: entering deep industrial corridor with yellow tunnel lighting
stopping at red traffic light then proceeding on green

agents.ego_description: navigating through the industrial corridor with exposed infrastructure

notable_agents.action: distant vehicle ahead waiting at traffic signal

entered.detail: dense cluster of large ventilation pipes and industrial ducts
warm yellow overhead lighting strips illuminating the corridor
rough concrete walls with industrial mounting brackets
metal grated walkway suspended from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a deep industrial corridor with dense clusters of exposed pipes and ventilation ducts. Warm yellow lighting strips illuminate the concrete walls as the vehicle approaches and stops at a red traffic light before proceeding. Metal catwalks hang overhead in this enclosed infrastructure tunnel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the claustrophobic darkness of an underground tunnel into the expansive, neon-lit vibrancy of a futuristic metropolis at dusk. It begins within a dark concrete tunnel illuminated by vertical neon strips, following a silver sedan toward a bright exit. As the vehicle emerges, the scene opens onto a wide suspension bridge under an orange dusk sky, revealing a skyline of glass skyscrapers framed by steel cables above calm waters. The camera then glides into an urban canyon flanked by green noise barriers and elevated walkways, where the natural light begins to blend with artificial street lamps. Finally, the environment shifts into a vivid commercial district, passing under massive digital billboards and colorful neon signage while navigating through city traffic.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a series of oppressive industrial underpasses that shift from red-tinted concrete to a warm, yellow-lit corridor. It begins as the vehicle enters a dark highway underpass defined by massive concrete support pillars and red ambient lighting, with exposed industrial pipes running overhead. As the car briefly emerges into a brighter commercial area, the camera quickly follows it back under the heavy infrastructure. The scene then shifts into a deep industrial corridor where dense clusters of ventilation ducts and metal catwalks hang from the ceiling. Finally, the lighting transitions to warm yellow strips along the concrete walls as the vehicle approaches and stops at a red traffic light before proceeding forward.
